name: Berlin bike counters
note: Official Radzaehlstellen workbook downloaded into data/raw/berlin_bike_counters_raw.xlsx and converted into hourly CSV plus counter-location GeoJSON.

name: Berlin bicycle shops and repair supply
note: Berlin-wide Geofabrik GPKG is stored locally and filtered on the bicycle shop class into berlin_bike_repair_shops.csv and berlin_bike_repair_shops.geojson.

name: VBB station access coordinates
note: Official UMBW station-access export is staged locally and normalized into UTF-8 CSV plus GeoJSON access points for corridor and station joins.

name: VBB GTFS static stops
note: Current GTFS static ZIP is stored under data/raw/vbb_gtfs.zip, with stops.txt exported as CSV and GeoJSON for stop and station coverage work.

name: Google Places ratings and review counts
note: Only a header-only CSV placeholder is committed locally. A Places API key and billing setup are required before this enrichment can be populated.

name: Yelp ratings and review counts
note: Only a header-only CSV placeholder is staged locally. Yelp developer credentials are required before review metadata can be fetched.

name: Station footfall and entry-exit counts
note: No verified public bulk passenger-count download is staged yet. The repo contains a placeholder CSV and the scoring model still relies on corridor and station proxies.

name: Berlin area enrichment (POIs, population, audience segments)
note: Universities, bike sharing stations, office/coworking hubs, district population density, cycling modal share, and audience segmentation. Used as fallback estimator for zones with sparse or zero bike counter data. Refresh via scripts/fetch-berlin-enrichment.ts (Overpass API) or update berlin-enrichment.json manually.

name: Betteride prototype seed layers
note: The live dashboard still renders the lightweight berlin-layers.json seed bundle for map performance and scoring transparency while the heavier raw files remain staged in data/raw.

name: Betteride partner operating footprint
note: Partner shops, slot capacity, and same-day coverage are still mocked placeholders and should later be replaced with CRM and bookings data.
